FILES.name: App.php
FILES.ctx:
<?php

namespace App;

class App
{
    public function run(): string
    {
        return "hello world";
    }
}

FILES.name: index.php
FILES.ctx:
<?php

require __DIR__ . '/../vendor/autoload.php';

use App\App;

$app = new App();
echo $app->run();

FILES.name: AppTest.php
FILES.ctx:
<?php

namespace Tests;

use App\App;
use PHPUnit\Framework\TestCase;

class AppTest extends TestCase
{
    public function testRun(): void
    {
        $app = new App();
        $this->assertSame('hello world', $app->run());
    }
}

FILES.name: readme.md
FILES.ctx:
# PHP Composer

Шаблон PHP-проекта с Composer и автозагрузкой PSR-4.

## Установка

```
composer install
```

## Запуск

```
php -S localhost:8000 -t public
```

## Тесты

```
composer install
vendor/bin/phpunit tests
```
